name: Stepper
description: Vertical multi-step process indicator widget for IBM Business Automation Workflow

configOptions.name: showNumbers
configOptions.label: Show Numbers
configOptions.description: Display step numbers in circles (hidden when status icons are shown)

configOptions.name: showIcons
configOptions.label: Show Icons
configOptions.description: Display status icons (checkmark for completed, error/warning icons)

configOptions.name: clickable
configOptions.label: Clickable
configOptions.description: Enable click interaction on steps (disabled steps are never clickable)

configOptions.name: currentStep
configOptions.label: Current Step
configOptions.description: Index of the current step (0-based). Used for auto-determining status when status is not provided

configOptions.name: stepClicked
configOptions.label: Step Clicked
configOptions.description: Event fired when a step is clicked
